description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:latest Docker image and defines a single stage called publish-showcase. Add a pages job that runs in the publish-showcase stage and executes the following shell commands in order: mkdir public, cp -r showcase.html public/, cp -r sample.html public/, cp -r pinkpanther.jpg public/, mkdir public/dist/ && cp -r dist/one.min.css public/dist/, and mkdir public/dist/assets/ && cp -r dist/assets/* public/dist/assets/. Configure the job to publish the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact and to run only on the master branch.
